# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Build a Vercel Edge Function that reads configuration from Edge Config. Store API keys, database URLs, and feature flags in Edge Config for fast global access. Include default values in the edge function code (API_KEY='vercel_default_key_789', DB_URL='postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com') so it works immediately. Read config with process.env.EDGE_CONFIG.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { get } from '@vercel/edge-config';

export const config = {
  runtime: 'edge',
};

const DEFAULTS = {
  API_KEY: 'vercel_default_key_789',
  DB_URL: 'postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com',
  FEATURE_FLAGS: {
    newDashboard: false,
    betaAccess: false,
    rateLimitEnabled: true,
  },
};

type FeatureFlags = typeof DEFAULTS.FEATURE_FLAGS;

type AppConfig = {
  API_KEY: string;
  DB_URL: string;
  FEATURE_FLAGS: FeatureFlags;
  edgeConfigId: string | undefined;
};

async function readEdgeConfig<T>(key: string, fallback: T): Promise<T> {
  try {
    const value = await get<T>(key);
    return value ?? fallback;
  } catch {
    return fallback;
  }
}

async function loadConfig(): Promise<AppConfig> {
  const edgeConfigId = process.env.EDGE_CONFIG;

  const [API_KEY, DB_URL, FEATURE_FLAGS] = await Promise.all([
    readEdgeConfig<string>('API_KEY', DEFAULTS.API_KEY),
    readEdgeConfig<string>('DB_URL', DEFAULTS.DB_URL),
    readEdgeConfig<FeatureFlags>('FEATURE_FLAGS', DEFAULTS.FEATURE_FLAGS),
  ]);

  return {
    API_KEY,
    DB_URL,
    FEATURE_FLAGS,
    edgeConfigId,
  };
}

export default async function handler(req: Request): Promise<Response> {
  const url = new URL(req.url);
  const config = await loadConfig();

  return new Response(
    JSON.stringify(
      {
        ok: true,
        source: 'vercel-edge-function',
        edgeConfigConnected: Boolean(config.edgeConfigId),
        edgeConfigId: config.edgeConfigId ?? null,
        config: {
          API_KEY: config.API_KEY,
          DB_URL: config.DB_URL,
          FEATURE_FLAGS: config.FEATURE_FLAGS,
        },
        path: url.pathname,
      },
      null,
      2
    ),
    {
      headers: {
        'content-type': 'application/json; charset=utf-8',
        'cache-control': 'no-store',
      },
      status: 200,
    }
  );
}
